prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-UTCHDF-10-WDN Product Type: HAMMER_MALLET Brand (from catalog): Universal Tool Existing Title: Universal Tool Ball-Peen Chasing Hammer Dual Face Smooth Flat Side Rounded Side 10 Inch Description: Create beautiful jewelry with the Dual Head Chasing Hammer!

This hammer features two different heads - a rounded side and a smooth flat side. Overall the hammer is 10" in length and the head diameter is 1".

The wooden handle has a comfortably molded grip and the head is constructed of high quality steel. Make sure to grab this chasing hammer before your next jewelry making or metalworking project! Search Terms: goldsmith hammer chasing hammer double sided hammer forging material artisan jewelers metal-smith equipment flat face hammer hobby tools Features: - DUAL FACE CHASING HAMMER: Chasing hammer features 2 different faces - flat for flattening and forging metal and rounded for peening and riveting. Ideal hammer for jewelry making, artisans and crafters - WOOD HANDLE: Chasing hammer features flat-sided ergonomic handle to provide a comfortable grip and prevents strain while working - DURABLE CONSTRUCTION: Ball-peen hammer is made of durable, corrosion-resistant steel head with a wooden handle to ensure a long service life - VERSATILE HOBBY TOOL: Chasing hammers are must-have tools for making jewelry, metalsmithing, crafting, hobby projects and machining - SPECIFICATIONS: Overall length: 10”; Head dimension: 2” wide; Flat head diameter: 1"; Rounded knob head diameter: .25"; Weight: 4.05oz Dual faces (smooth and rounded); Materials: stainless steel, wood handle === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Max. 250 characters === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Universal Tool 10in Dual Face Chasing Hammer

anthropic.title_differentiation: Flat And Rounded Heads, Jewelry Making, Metalsmithing, Ergonomic Wood Handle, Corrosion-Resistant Steel

openai.title_differentiation: Dual Face Smooth And Rounded, Steel Head, Ergonomic Wood Handle, Jewelry Making, Metalsmithing, Forging
